description: Creates a 2D Cartesian graph container. The type() argument is mandatory and determines the mode: geometry mode (uniform 1:1 scale for drawings) or plotting mode (stretches to fill for function graphing). Additional type values configure specialized axis scales.
utility: Create a 2D graph container with mandatory type (geometry or plotting), position, size, ranges, grid, and border

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Logical position using at(row, col) coordinates on the canvas grid

arguments.name: size/height
arguments.description: Geometry mode: single size value (both row and column). Plotting mode: row height in logical units

arguments.name: width
arguments.description: Column width in logical units. Only used in plotting mode — omit in geometry mode

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Geometry mode: single range for both axes (default [-1, 6]). Plotting mode: x-axis range (default [-5, 5])

arguments.name: type
arguments.type: type(geometry) | type(plotting) | type(trig) | type(invtrig) | type(log) | type(exp) | type(complex)
arguments.description: MANDATORY. type(geometry): uniform 1:1 scale, single size, single range, default [-1, 6]. type(plotting): separate height/width and x/y ranges, stretches to fill, default [-5, 5]. type(trig): pi-based scale on both axes. type(invtrig): pi-based on y-axis only. type(log): logarithmic axes. type(exp): exponential axes. type(complex): complex plane with Re/Im labels and auto-grid

arguments.name: grid
arguments.description: grid() enables grid lines with axes. grid(noaxes) hides axes/ticks/labels/grid. grid(nolines) shows axes but no gridlines. grid(c(color), s(width)) styles gridlines

arguments.name: border
arguments.description: Border styling with color and shadow, e.g., br("black", 0.5)

alternates.description: 1:1 scale with default range [-1, 6], size applies to both dimensions

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), size, range(min, max), type(geometry))
alternates.description: 1:1 scale with custom range applied to both axes

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), size, range(min, max), type(geometry), grid())

alternates.description: Stretches to fill with default [-5, 5] on both axes

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), rowHeight, colWidth, range(xMin, xMax), range(yMin, yMax), type(plotting))
alternates.description: Stretches to fill with explicit x and y ranges

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), rowHeight, colWidth, range(xMin, xMax, xStep), range(yMin, yMax, yStep), type(plotting))
g2d(at(row, col), size, range(min, max), type(complex))
alternates.description: Complex plane with Re/Im axis labels and grid auto-enabled

examples.scenario: Geometry graph for circle equation lesson with step size
Geometry graph with axes for circle on axis intercepts lesson
Geometry graph with noaxes for diameter through center lesson
Geometry graph with snap disabled for point and circle position lesson
Geometry graph for linear programming with intersections
Plotting graph for table data visualization with multiple columns
Plotting graph for function table with wider range
Plotting graph with default ranges for triangle and line
